content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description claims "Built-in ad blocker", "AI-powered suggestions", and "Works fully offline", but ContentView.swift only implements a plain in-memory task list with no ad-blocking, ML/AI, or persistence code (App/ContentView.swift:1-24; fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1-3).
Pierre: Apple rejects apps under 2.1 when marketing copy promises features the binary does not deliver. Your description advertises three distinct capabilities — ad blocking, AI suggestions, offline persistence — yet the only Swift file is a basic task list with no matching imports (no CoreML, no content blocker extension, no storage). Either implement these features or remove the claims from the description before submission.
